source_notes: Prices from official API docs as of June 2026. Benchmarks from SWE-bench, Aider Polyglot, Artificial Analysis, LiveBench, and model provider reports. Coding Quality Score blends SWE-bench Pro (40%), Aider Polyglot (35%), and LiveCodeBench (25%). See README for research-backed methodology.
